blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 57°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
